Texts.Home:Title: Company contact information management
Texts.Home:Description: Use this system to maintain company basic data, contact person, phone number, website, capital amount and employee size in a shared tenant environment.
Texts.Home:QuickInfoDescription: The system is initialized with a default tenant and company management permissions.
